description: Whether the municipality has exclusive or shared authority over waste collection and management
Whether the municipality has authority over public transport and traffic within the commune
Whether the municipality may apply environmental protection standards (e.g. building efficiency)
Whether the municipality has authority over urban planning and the communal regulatory plan
Municipal actions must comply with national and regional plans (cross-cutting)
Whether municipalities may contract private entities via public bidding for works or services
Maximum share of municipal budget that may be granted as subsidies to non-profit entities (e.g. 7%)
